title: 2024 09 05 Building Phase Work Blueprint
html:
TL;DR

  • Three-week-into-Shanghai brain-dump where Yahir lays the operating system for his China chapter: Karpathy's morning-deep-work hack (no social/email/messages until 2–3 hours of focus), AI as the integral substrate, language learning as the headline goal.
  • Names two proof-of-concept apps that become the seeds of his next two years: an Anabolic Bro Menu scanner (the early form of BroMenu / later Brotein) and a continued side quest AR location-verification app (the first appearance of the sidequest concept).
  • Commits to a blog as a third pursuit — "a way of journaling" — which is the same impulse the Apple Notes already serves; signals Yahir is searching for a more publishable form of the writing instinct.
  • Sets a concrete language-learning milestone: "have a genuine conversation with the older security guard man that works the night shift in your dorm" — a piercingly specific, person-anchored Mandarin goal that pushes past textbook fluency framing.
  • Locks in the operating frame: "think small, the big thing will be deviations and branches from what you do" — a deviation/optionality logic that anticipates the BroMenu→Brotein→Rankett arc.

Core content

This is the China chapter table of contents note, written in the first weeks of Shanghai while the routines were still being established. The Karpathy reference is the earliest Karpathy citation in the corpus that's clearly an applied practice, not just a saved quote — Yahir is operationalizing the cold-start morning / no input until output discipline.

The two app concepts are interesting in retrospect. The Anabolic Bro Menu pitch — "scan a menu, tells you which dishes have the most protein and best anabolic ratio" — is recognizably the spec that becomes bromenu and later brotein. The continued sidequest app ("leveled-up list app where people add things to do in a place, you verify with AR the artifact") is more amorphous and arguably became the / dream app cluster.

The most overlooked line is the framing for why he wants the apps: "Something that you can say that you did. Could be the start of something big." This is shipping-as-credentialing, and it's the same muscle that lights up the 2026 Rankett sales scripts.

Stub-promotion notes

  • karpathy — was stub; this ingest pushes it past 3 mentions (existing stub + 2024 05 13 things + this doc). PROMOTE in next densify pass — has clear thread as an applied-practice influence, not just a saved quote.
  • bromenu — already exists; this is the origin story citation.
  • anabolic scoring — already exists; this is its first explicit articulation.

Connections

  • china chapter — parent era
  • shanghai — location
  • bromenu — direct seed
  • brotein — downstream evolution
  • from fitness to software the brotein arc — synthesis arc
  • — competing form for the journaling impulse
